creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
On Fri, Apr 21, 2000 at 04:40:45PM -0700, tkato@prontomail.ne.jp wrote:
> >Category:       ports
> >Synopsis:       Update port: ftp/downloader to 1.15 (fix ports/18138)

I keep getting this error with this patch..:

cd face && EXECC="c++  -pedantic -D_REENTRANT -D_POSIX_PTHREAD_SEMANTICS
`/usr/X11R6/bin/gtk12-config --cflags` -DENABLE_NLS
-DLOCALE=\"/usr/local/share/locale\"" make
"Makefile", line 11: Need an operator
make: fatal errors encountered -- cannot continue
*** Error code 1

Stop.
*** Error code 1

I don't think USE_GMAKE=yes is the solution (that doesnt work anyway).

-- 
Will Andrews <andrews@technologist.com>

G++>+++ e->++++ h! r-->+++ y?
